en: Hear this word that I take up over you in lamentation, O house of Israel:
zh: 以色列家啊！要聽這話， 就是我為你們唱的輓歌：

en: "Fallen, no more to rise, is the virgin Israel; forsaken on her land, with none to raise her up."
zh: “童貞女以色列， 跌倒了，不能再起來； 她被拋棄在自己的地上， 沒有人扶她起來。”

en: For thus says the Lord GOD: "The city that went out a thousand shall have a hundred left, and that which went out a hundred shall have ten left to the house of Israel."
zh: 因為主耶和華論以色列家這樣說： “這城派兵一千， 剩下的只有一百； 出兵一百， 只剩下十個。”

en: For thus says the LORD to the house of Israel: "Seek me and live;
zh: 耶和華對以色列家這樣說： “尋求我，就必存活；

en: but do not seek Bethel, and do not enter into Gilgal or cross over to Beersheba; for Gilgal shall surely go into exile, and Bethel shall come to nothing."
zh: 不要去伯特利尋求我， 不要去吉甲， 也不要過去別是巴。 因為吉甲必被擄掠， 伯特利必化為烏有。”

en: Seek the LORD and live, lest he break out like fire in the house of Joseph, and it devour, with none to quench it for Bethel,
zh: 尋求耶和華，就必存活， 免得他像火在約瑟家猛烈蔓延，吞滅他們； 沒有人能把伯特利的火撲滅。

en: O you who turn justice to wormwood and cast down righteousness to the earth!
zh: 他們使公正變為苦堇， 把公義棄於地上。

en: He who made the Pleiades and Orion, and turns deep darkness into the morning and darkens the day into night, who calls for the waters of the sea and pours them out on the surface of the earth, the LORD is his name;
zh: 那創造昴星和參星， 把幽暗變為黎明， 把白日轉為黑夜； 又吩咐海水， 把海水倒在地上的； 耶和華就是他的名。

en: who makes destruction flash forth against the strong, so that destruction comes upon the fortress.
zh: 是他使毀滅像閃電臨到堡壘， 使毀滅臨到堅固的城。

en: They hate him who reproves in the gate, and they abhor him who speaks the truth.
zh: 他們討厭那在城門口主持公道的人， 恨惡說正直話的。

en: Therefore because you trample on the poor and you exact taxes of grain from him, you have built houses of hewn stone, but you shall not dwell in them; you have planted pleasant vineyards, but you shall not drink their wine.
zh: 你們欺壓窮人， 強徵他們的五穀； 因此，你們用琢磨過的石頭建造房屋， 卻不能住在其中； 你們栽種美好的葡萄園， 卻不能喝園中的酒。

en: For I know how many are your transgressions and how great are your sins- you who afflict the righteous, who take a bribe, and turn aside the needy in the gate.
zh: 因為我知道你們的過犯眾多，罪大惡極； 你們迫害義人，收受賄賂， 在城門口屈枉窮乏人；

en: Therefore he who is prudent will keep silent in such a time, for it is an evil time.
zh: 為此，聰明人在這時代緘默無聲， 因這時代邪惡。

en: Seek good, and not evil, that you may live; and so the LORD, the God of hosts, will be with you, as you have said.
zh: 你們要尋求良善，不要尋求邪惡， 這樣才可以存活。 耶和華萬軍的 神就必與你們同在， 正如你們所說的。

en: Hate evil, and love good, and establish justice in the gate; it may be that the LORD, the God of hosts, will be gracious to the remnant of Joseph.
zh: 你們要喜愛良善，恨惡邪惡， 在城門口伸張正義； 這樣，耶和華萬軍的 神或會恩待約瑟的餘民。

en: Therefore thus says the LORD, the God of hosts, the Lord: "In all the squares there shall be wailing, and in all the streets they shall say, 'Alas! Alas!' They shall call the farmers to mourning and to wailing those who are skilled in lamentation,
zh: 因此，主耶和華萬軍的 神這樣說： “各廣場充滿哀慟的聲音， 街上只聽見‘苦啊！苦啊！’的喊聲； 人要召農夫來哀哭， 召善於哭喪的人來哀喊。

en: and in all vineyards there shall be wailing, for I will pass through your midst," says the LORD.
zh: 所有葡萄園充滿哀慟的聲音， 因為我必在你們中間經過。” 這是耶和華說的。

en: Woe to you who desire the day of the LORD! Why would you have the day of the LORD? It is darkness, and not light,
zh: 渴望耶和華日子來臨的人，你們有禍了！ 耶和華的日子對你們有甚麼好處呢？ 那日是黑暗，沒有光明的日子。

en: as if a man fled from a lion, and a bear met him, or went into the house and leaned his hand against the wall, and a serpent bit him.
zh: 那日就像一個人避過了獅子， 卻遇上了熊； 回到家裡，手靠在牆上， 卻被蛇咬。

en: Is not the day of the LORD darkness, and not light, and gloom with no brightness in it?
zh: 耶和華的日子不是黑暗，沒有光明， 只有幽暗，全無光輝嗎？

en: "I hate, I despise your feasts, and I take no delight in your solemn assemblies.
zh: 我憎恨、厭惡你們的節期， 也不喜愛你們的節日。

en: Even though you offer me your burnt offerings and grain offerings, I will not accept them; and the peace offerings of your fattened animals, I will not look upon them.
zh: 雖然你們給我獻上燔祭和素祭， 我卻不接受。 你們獻上肥美的牲畜作平安祭， 我也不悅納。

en: Take away from me the noise of your songs; to the melody of your harps I will not listen.
zh: 你們唱歌的吵聲要遠離我， 我不想聽見你們的琴聲。

en: But let justice roll down like waters, and righteousness like an ever-flowing stream.
zh: 但願公正好像潮水滾流， 公義好像河水長流。

en: "Did you bring to me sacrifices and offerings during the forty years in the wilderness, O house of Israel?
zh: 以色列家啊！你們在曠野四十年， 有獻燔祭和素祭給我嗎？

en: You shall take up Sikkuth your king, and Kiyyun your star-god- your images that you made for yourselves,
zh: 你們抬著你們的神“撒固”王，和你們的星神“迦溫”的神像，就是你們為自己所做的。

en: and I will send you into exile beyond Damascus," says the LORD, whose name is the God of hosts.
zh: 我必使你們被擄，流亡到大馬士革以外。這是耶和華說的，萬軍的 神就是他的名。
